# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt

An anchored parent route already has a quest passport, named outputs, and a
bounded need for one local reviewer child to inspect a narrow package fix
before the parent route continues.

## Expected selection

use

## Why

The route is already real, anchored, and bounded. The honest next move is one
child-route delegation decision with explicit lane, gate, return, and closeout
posture rather than a bigger orchestration jump.

## Expected object

A summon decision with lane, gates, and an explicit return plus closeout plan
for one bounded child route.

## Boundary notes

Use this skill when the parent route is already anchored and the child helper
is narrower than the parent route. Keep local Codex execution as the default,
keep the passport and gates explicit, and keep return planning tied back to
reviewed closeout.

## Verification hooks

The response should name the lane, confirm why a bounded local reviewer child
is honest here, keep progression or self-agent gates visible if they apply,
and spell out how the child result returns to the parent route.
